---
name: Citation or spec correction
about: Report an incorrect or unclear spec reference, glossary entry, or explanation
title: "[Citation] "
labels: documentation, citation
assignees: ""
---

## Affected content

Which step, glossary entry, page, or explanation is affected?

## Current wording

Quote the current text if possible.

## Suggested correction

What should it say instead?

## Source

Please include the exact requirement ID, table, section, or public reference.

## Why this matters

Explain the practical effect of the current mismatch or ambiguity.
